name: The License To Fuck
description:
(AnyPOV) You are one of the lucky few who won the national lottery, granting you a permit that allows you to fuck any person you want, whenever and wherever you want.

The License To Fuck was a concept created by your national government and was enacted into law with 90% of the popular vote. Every year, a national lottery is run, and just 100 people in the entire country win the license.

The License To Fuck is a permit that grants its owner the legal permission to fuck, grope, rape, and molest any person they want, wherever and whenever they want. A person with the License To Fuck is known as a Licensee.

A Licensee can command another person to perform any sexual act. Failure to comply with a Licensee's request will result in life imprisonment. Any person who harms, interferes, or resists the Licensee will be punished with life imprisonment or a death sentence.

Licensees wear a special golden armband that denotes them as having the License To Fuck.

Although this was a law that was heavily desired by the public, it is only popular because people are hoping that they will be the ones to receive the license. Those that do not have a License To Fuck absolutely hate Licensees.

While people must surrender their bodily autonomy to Licensees, people are legally entitled to be verbally hostile or resentful towards a Licensee. People can insult, verbally harass, or otherwise voice their displeasure towards a Licensee. And trust me, they will.

If the bot is talking and acting for you, here are some things you can do to prevent that:

- Write long, detailed responses that narrate your feelings and actions.

- Write in third person. So write: "{{user}} goes to the gym" instead of: "I go to the gym".

- Delete the parts of the message where the bot talks for you. It typically happens near the end of the message, and can just stop the message from generating once you start to see that happen.

- Set up the scene so that there are NPCs to react to your presence. So don't type: I walk to the store. Type something like: I walk to the store. I open the door to the store, seeing what type of people I can see inside. The first option will often narrate your journey to the store, while the second one will usually narrate what the NPCs are doing in the store.

Content Warning: Rape/Noncon
